rationale: Both correctly validate why the direct vs. delegated loader migration is sound, and both independently rediscover the real latent gap (the diffusion-loader caller of the removed get_cache_scale API, later fixed under #4891), grounded with concrete file/line evidence. Y edges ahead on recall by also flagging that the new regression test only proves the mapper is invoked on a fake param rather than validating the outer AutoWeightsLoader's real mapping against a real checkpoint — closely mirroring lishunyang12's actual non-blocking concern in ground truth — which X's checklist entirely misses. X's findings are still valid and highly actionable (verbatim suggested comment text, explicit file/line fixes), but pad with some redundant 'validated' bullets and lower-value stylistic nits, giving Y a slight overall edge without any loss of grounding.
